content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Daily Update (Apr 16, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 16, 2026, focused on repository maintenance and tooling improvements. The team initiated a pull request to standardize linting processes by updating the biome execution method.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Tooling and Linting Improvements**
    *   Initiated a transition to use `bunx` for biome invocation to improve consistency and replace relative path dependencies. [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/pull/23)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/pull/23): fix(lint): replace relative biome path with bunx invocation. This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
